title: The Number I Couldn't Text
theme: The number he could not text until hope became action.
sceneDescription: Chapter 2 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using soft watercolor memory field, drifting light, symbolic objects. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
